tool_args.label: Temporary Fare Pilot Program on the Railroads

payload.project_name: Temporary Fare Pilot Program on the Railroads
payload.description: MTA proposed temporary fare pilot promotion for railroad customers for a discount up to 10% on monthly passes within the city zones, starting with sale of monthly passes for July 2024, duration at least 12 months
routes_served: MTA Railroads within New York City

evidence_refs.source_quote: MTA is seeking Board approval to launch a temporary fare pilot promotion pertaining to travel on MTA Railroads within New York City. ... a temporary fare pilot promotion for railroad customers for a discount up to 10% on monthly passes within the city zones. This fare pilot promotion will start with the sale of monthly passes for July 2024. The duration of this fare pilot promotion will be at least 12 months

tool_args.label: Automated Bus Lane Enforcement Systems for NYC Transit

payload.description: Ratification of an Immediate Operating Need for contracts with Hayden AI and Seon USA Corp for purchase, installation, operation, and maintenance of Automated Bus Lane Enforcement systems

evidence_refs.source_quote: Lisette Camilo, Chief Administrative Officer reported one information item for NYC Transit this month ... requesting the Board to approve the ratification of an Immediate Operating Need for contracts with Hayden AI and Seon USA Corp for the purchase, installation, operation, and maintenance of Automated Bus Lane Enforcement systems. Hayden will provide up to 1,023 systems and Seon, up to 1,000.

tool_args.label: Open Data launch for finance materials

payload.event_name: Open Data launch for finance materials
payload.description: Open Data was launched last week and is live for finance materials. Finance information on Open Data includes MTA Financial Plans, tables by agency, budgets by financial plan, revenues, actuals and headcount data on a monthly basis.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Open Data was launched last week and is live for finance materials. Finance information on Open Data includes MTA Financial Plans, tables by agency, budgets by financial plan, revenues, actuals and headcount data on a monthly basis.
